appearance.loadingAnimation.title: Loading animation
appearance.loadingAnimation.ikun.label: ikun
appearance.loadingAnimation.ikun.descrip: Dribbles and crosses the ball through the 3 by 3 grid.
appearance.loadingAnimation.ymca.label: ymca
appearance.loadingAnimation.ymca.descrip: Swings side to side with raised-arm YMCA dance poses.
appearance.loadingAnimation.siu.label: siu
appearance.loadingAnimation.siu.descript: Runs up, jumps, turns, and lands in the SIU celebration pose.

appearance.fileIcons.material.label: Material
appearance.fileIcons.minimal.label: Minimal
appearance.navigation.title: Navigation
appearance.navigation.bottom.label: Bottom
appearance.navigation.bottom.description: Horizontal controls at the bottom of the sidebar.
appearance.navigation.top.label: Top
appearance.navigation.top.description: Horizontal controls above the file tree.
appearance.navigation.left.label: Left
appearance.navigation.left.description: Vertical controls on the left edge of the sidebar.

appearance.pluginsShortcut.detail: Show the local Plugins entry in workspace navigation.
appearance.headerElements.title: Header elements
appearance.pointerCursors.title: Pointer cursors
appearance.pointerCursors.detail: Show a hand cursor over clickable controls.
appearance.dockIcon.title: Dock icon
appearance.dockIcon.polished.label: Polished
appearance.dockIcon.light.label: Light
appearance.dockIcon.light.description: A warm light icon with a quiet outline.
appearance.dockIcon.matte.label: Matte
appearance.dockIcon.matte.description: A flat dark icon without the metallic rim.
account.title: Account
account.detail: PuppyOne Cloud account and desktop sign-in session.
account.error.oauthUnavailable: Desktop web sign-in is unavailable in this build.
editor.title: Editor
editor.detail: Local editor and review preferences for this device.
editor.aiAssist.title: AI edit assist
editor.aiAssist.detail: Show optional agent change markers and the review card in editors. Off by default.
editor.diffMarkers.title: Diff markers
editor.diffMarkers.detail: Choose markers for compact AI reviews. Git Changes always shows +/−.
experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.detail: Opt in to early desktop experiences. Every experiment is off by default.
experimental.markdownBlockDrag.detail: Enable early same-document block rearrangement in Markdown Live Preview.
experimental.markdownBlockDrag.title: Markdown block drag handles
experimental.minimalMode.detail: Replace persistent app chrome with one centered hover dock while keeping project, Git, Chat, and Terminal actions available.
experimental.minimalMode.title: Minimal Mode
experimental.viewerPlugins.title: Viewer plugins
experimental.viewerPlugins.detail: Enable the experimental local-only Plugins page and its optional navigation shortcut.
experimental.editorSaveStatus.title: Editor save status
experimental.editorSaveStatus.detail: Show the top-right save control and status diagnostics. Files continue to save normally when this is hidden.
experimental.projectsHome.title: Projects homepage
experimental.projectsHome.detail: Try the experimental unified card layout for Cloud and local projects.
experimental.agentChat.title: Agent Chat
experimental.agentChat.detail: Show the experimental Chat icon in the header. Terminal remains a separate button and stays available when this is off.
experimental.cloudWorkspace.title: PuppyOne Cloud
experimental.cloudWorkspace.detail: Show the Cloud navigation entry and the Cloud publish reminder in Source Control.
experimental.appFiles.title: PuppyOne App files
experimental.appFiles.detail: Show PuppyOne App in New > Custom files.
experimental.flowFiles.title: PuppyFlow files
experimental.flowFiles.detail: Show PuppyFlow in New > Custom files.
files.title: Git Ignore
files.detail: Control which local files appear in this workspace.
defaultApps.title: Default Apps
defaultApps.detail: Choose which app opens each local file type.
defaultApps.executableProtection.title: Executable file protection
defaultApps.executableProtection.detail: Always ask before opening files that may run code or install software.
defaultApps.addFileType.title: Add file type
defaultApps.addFileType.detail: Use the extension without a dot.
defaultApps.invalidExtension: Enter a file extension like md, pdf, or json.
defaultApps.empty: No custom defaults. Files open with the default app selected in macOS.
cloud.title: Cloud Hosting
cloud.detail: Choose the service PuppyOne treats as this workspace's sync authority.

git.detail: Repository status and remote connections for this workspace.
